description: Filename stem of the lip cutout, with the '_lip' suffix stripped.

Mean green channel value (0-255) across lip pixels passing the HSB threshold.
Mean blue channel value (0-255) across lip pixels passing the HSB threshold.
Mean hue value (0-255 scale, matching ImageJ's HSB Stack) across lip pixels passing the threshold.
Mean saturation value (0-255 scale) across lip pixels passing the threshold.
Mean brightness value (0-255 scale) across lip pixels passing the threshold.
Mean uncorrected CIELAB L value across lip pixels passing the threshold. sRGB(D65) to XYZ to Lab pipeline.
Mean uncorrected CIELAB a value across lip pixels passing the threshold.
Mean uncorrected CIELAB b value across lip pixels passing the threshold.
